Notebook Export
A Brief History of Time
Hawking, Stephen
Citation (Chicago Style): Hawking, Stephen. A Brief History of Time. Bantam Books, 1988. Kindle edition.
1 Our Picture of the Universe
Highlight(yellow) - Page 1 · Location 42
A well-known scientist once gave a public lecture on astronomy.
Highlight(blue) - Page 3 · Location 87
Any physical theory is always provisional, in the sense that it is only a hypothesis: you can never prove it.
2 Space and Time
Highlight(yellow) - Page 22 · Location 310
The theory of relativity put an end to the idea of absolute time.
Highlight(pink) - Page 25 · Location 357
It is a matter of common experience that one can get from any point in space to any other point in space.
